Artyom
Yagovdik

Engineering Lead — Software Architect
Philosophy

Engineering Lead based in Frankfurt. A decade building high-scale commerce platforms. Specializing in Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS. Bridging the gap between complex business ROI and robust, scalable code.

Approach

ROI First

Good code means nothing if it doesn't move the business forward. Focus on shipping features that actually matter.

Ownership

Teams work best when people own their decisions. I hire smart engineers and get out of their way.

Reliability

Systems that process millions in revenue can't afford downtime. Architect for failure because it will happen.

Keep Moving

Technical debt compounds. Don't chase the latest framework, but ensure the architecture remains future-proof.

Core Units

Sento

High-performance Chrome MV3 rewrite assistant. Injects a Shadow DOM “liquid glass” bubble for in-place text modification via OpenAI, Gemini, or Grok with framework-aware replacement.

Synto

Clean Markdown extraction for AI workflows. Bridges the gap between messy web pages and LLMs by stripping clutter. Privacy-first design with local-only storage.

Sonto

A quiet side-panel clipboard manager for Chrome. Features include clipboard history, tagged snippets, and a time-aware Zen feed for slow consumption.

Nemo

Privacy-focused browser extension password manager. Implements biometric unlock, PIN fallback, and optional zero-knowledge sync. Plaintext never leaves your browser.

Awesome Hyva

A curated technical intelligence hub for Hyvä theme development. Resources, compatibility trackers, and ecosystem tooling for modern Magento storefronts.
Elsewhere
